machine.name: Community Services Community Executive Optimization Public Trust Feedback Loop
machine.description: Community-services machine for public trust feedback loop in the community executive optimization workstream. It monitors resident sentiment, complaint closure, outreach quality, and transparency readiness and emits AI-triggered actions for health and human services, law enforcement/public safety coordination, homelessness response, and city operations.

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: resident sentiment, complaint closure, outreach quality, and transparency readiness
metadata.upstreamMachine: Community Services Community Executive Optimization Community Operations Digital Twin
downstreamMachines: Community Services Community Executive Optimization Community Services Command Center
metadata.crossDomainOutputPurpose: resident feedback into transit feedback analysis
agentActions: Dispatch city_operations_agent for urgent community-services intervention on public trust feedback loop.
Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for public trust feedback loop.
Create field work order or mobile team task for public trust feedback loop.
Maintain monitored service path for public trust feedback loop.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map 311, case-management, CAD/RMS, shelter HMIS, benefit enrollment, outreach, public health, and transit-access signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to case workers, mobile crisis, public safety, housing navigators, field crews, transportation dispatch, or health-service agents.
metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [3895:3899] feeds Community Services Community Executive Optimization Community Services Command Center.

sequences.name: Public Trust Feedback Loop: WATCH -> URGENT_RESPONSE

metadata.description: Escalates resident or field risk into urgent response.

metadata.action: Dispatch city_operations_agent for urgent community-services intervention on public trust feedback loop.

sequences.name: Public Trust Feedback Loop: COORDINATION_NEEDED -> COORDINATE_SERVICES

metadata.action: Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for public trust feedback loop.

sequences.name: Public Trust Feedback Loop: FIELD_TASK_NEEDED -> FIELD_WORK_ORDER

metadata.description: Creates a field crew, outreach, or mobile response task.

metadata.action: Create field work order or mobile team task for public trust feedback loop.

sequences.name: Public Trust Feedback Loop: STABLE_PATH -> STABLE_SERVICE_PATH

metadata.description: Confirms resident service path is stable and monitored.

metadata.action: Maintain monitored service path for public trust feedback loop.

inputSequences.name: Urgent response sequence
inputSequences.description: Two-step community risk escalation ending in urgent response.

inputSequences.name: Coordinate services
inputSequences.description: Coordinates health, public safety, housing, transit, or city service partners.

inputSequences.name: Field work order
inputSequences.description: Creates a field response or outreach task.

inputSequences.name: Stable service path
inputSequences.description: Confirms the resident or city service path is stable.

inputSequences.name: Baseline without output
inputSequences.description: Initial observation arms the urgent path without firing.
